prompt:
Hermes, implement the Eric Bellinger website copy/data refresh inside the project at /eric-bellinger.

Primary source data file to use:
- eric_bellinger_filled_website_copy_manifest.json

If this file is not already in the project, copy it into:
- /eric-bellinger/src/data/ericBellingerSiteCopy.json

Your goal is to replace the generic/placeholder copy and fallback data with the researched Eric Bellinger copy, catalog data, tour data, credits, featured songs, and section labels from the manifest. Do not invent facts. Do not call AI at runtime. Do not use generic Unsplash fallback art for Eric Bellinger releases.

Implementation rules:
1. Inspect the repo first. Confirm the project uses these files before editing:
   - src/App.tsx
   - src/components/Navbar.tsx
   - src/components/Hero.tsx
   - src/components/TourDates.tsx
   - src/components/discography/DiscographySection.tsx
   - src/components/discography/DiscographyDetailsSheet.tsx
   - src/components/featured-songs/FeaturedSongsSection.tsx
   - src/components/credits/CreditsSection.tsx
   - src/components/Interviews.tsx
   - src/components/Footer.tsx
   - src/data/index.ts
   - src/data/discography.ts
   - src/data/featuredSongs.ts
   - src/data/credits.ts

2. Add the manifest data file:
   - src/data/ericBellingerSiteCopy.json

3. Create or update TypeScript types if the project uses TS:
   - src/types/ericBellingerSiteCopy.ts
   Include types for:
   - copyManifest
   - tour dates
   - albums
   - tracks
   - feature songs
   - songwriting credits
   - videos/interviews
   - source registry
   - data quality flags

4. Update src/data/index.ts so components can import the new manifest cleanly.

5. Component implementation targets:

   Navbar:
   - Use copyManifest.navigation labels and CTA.
   - Preserve section anchors and icons.

   Hero:
   - Replace eyebrow, headline, summary, primary CTA, secondary CTA, and archive CTA from copyManifest.hero.
   - Use copyManifest.hero.latestProject for title, release date, description, listen links, and credits.
   - Remove the generic Unsplash hero fallback.
   - If latestProject.coverUrl is null, render a polished neutral placeholder that says “Artwork pending verification” or use the site’s approved fallback component.
   - Use latestProject.links.appleMusic, shazam, and youtube where exact URLs exist.
   - Do not invent Spotify or YouTube Music exact URLs when the manifest says NEEDS_RESEARCH_EXACT_URL.

   TourDates:
   - Replace fake tour data with copyManifest.tour.activeTourDates/allTourDates.
   - Use the verified date/time/city/venue/status/ticketsUrl fields.
   - If status includes “verify,” display a neutral CTA like “Tickets” rather than overclaiming availability.
   - Preserve archive toggle UI.

   DiscographySection:
   - Replace current release array with canonicalCatalog.albums from the manifest.
   - Show countPill from copyManifest.discography.countPill.
   - Render cards with title, year, project_type, cover/coverAsset if present, track count, and route links.
   - Use album.urls.primary_router first, then album.urls.direct.apple_music/spotify, then fallback_search only when no direct link exists.

   DiscographyDetailsSheet:
   - Use album.siteCopy.projectContext for the project context paragraph.
   - Render every track in album.tracks with track_number, display_title/title, duration, features, and credits.
   - Show featured artists from track.features.
   - Only render writers/producers/personnel sections when the arrays are populated.
   - If writer/producer/personnel arrays are empty, either hide the row or show “Credits pending verification” based on the existing design pattern.

   FeaturedSongsSection:
   - Use copyManifest.features.featuredSongs.
   - Each card should show title, artist, coverUrl if available, note, and source.
   - If coverUrl is missing/null, render “Artwork pending verification.”
   - Do not use fake cover art.

   CreditsSection:
   - Use copyManifest.credits.heading/subheading/copy/countPill.
   - Render canonicalCatalog.songwritingCredits.
   - Include achievementHighlights as a small credibility strip or optional intro cards.
   - Phrase the GRAMMY note carefully: “Grammy-winning songwriter” is acceptable only in songwriter/contributor context. Do not imply the official GRAMMY artist profile lists a solo artist win.

   Interviews:
   - Use copyManifest.interviews heading/subheading and labels.
   - Render canonicalCatalog.interviews.
   - Some records may be official audio, music videos, or performances rather than interviews. If a record is not clearly an interview, label it as “Video” or “Official Clip” instead of forcing it into interview copy.

   Footer:
   - Use copyManifest.footer heading/subheading/form labels/booking/copyright/socialLinks.
   - Keep bookingEmail only if it exists in the manifest, but mark it easy to replace later.
   - Use dynamic current year for copyright.

6. Data quality / safety:
   - Respect all dataQualityFlags in the manifest.
   - Do not invent exact DSP URLs, production credits, personnel, ticket statuses, or cover art.
   - Use null-safe rendering everywhere.
   - Hide or clearly label unresolved metadata.

7. After implementation, run the project’s normal checks:
   - npm install only if dependencies are missing.
   - npm run build
   - npm run lint if available
   - npm test if available

8. Create an implementation report at:
   - /eric-bellinger/copy_implementation_report.md

The report must include:
- files changed
- data file path used
- sections implemented
- unresolved NEEDS_RESEARCH items
- build/lint/test command results
- any assumptions made

Important: Preserve the existing visual design and section hierarchy. This is a copy/data implementation task, not a redesign.
acceptanceCriteria: No generic Unsplash hero cover appears for Eric Bellinger releases.
No # placeholder links remain for streaming, tour, or social CTAs.
Discography renders 44 project records from canonicalCatalog.albums unless the UI intentionally filters them.
Tracklists render from album.tracks and include all available feature credits.
Featured songs section renders 113 records from the manifest.
Credits section renders 120 public-source credit records from the manifest.
Unverified credits/links/artwork are hidden or marked as pending, not fabricated.
Build completes or the report explains the exact failure.
